narrative:
Hamilton Twp. township has 1,049 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.1 percentage points.
